title: front/BBOX faceted 45-degree turtle shell roof; PTO side remains open
notes: Open at PTO/front. Use with optional front splash visor only; do not block PTO/E-stop access.

title: rear/CBOX faceted 45-degree turtle shell roof; use with rear cap if clearance permits
notes: Rear side can be closed by REAR-CAP. Keep service access and drainage in mind.

title: optional faceted rear closure cap for CBOX side; includes lower drain notches
notes: Use on rear/CBOX end only. Do not fully seal if trapped mud/water cannot drain.

title: optional open PTO-side splash visor; sheds water but does not close the front
notes: Keep PTO side open. Use only if it does not interfere with unit attachment/removal.

title: left detachable side sponson float; separate from roof and away from DRC/DRIVE
notes: Not guaranteed watertight as raw FDM. Seal or fill with closed-cell foam before water tests.

title: right detachable side sponson float; separate from roof and away from DRC/DRIVE
notes: Print one first and dry-fit. Preserve tire and gearbox clearance before water tests.

title: printable adapter saddle for existing FLT-RCV receiver; side-float mount
notes: Use as removable adapter. Do not make the float shell touch side gearboxes.
